doctrine.oneLineDefinition: LeeWay = Freedom to build, enforced through layers, executed through systems, and delivered through governed outcomes.
doctrine.finalTruth: Freedom survives at scale not by removing limits, but by designing them correctly.

L.name: Layered Foundations
L.principle: Freedom is contained without being restricted.
L.operationalMeaning: Capabilities must remain in proper layers with clear ownership boundaries.

E1.name: Execution Law
E1.operationalMeaning: Every operation follows the governed path Standards -> Integrated -> Runtime.

E2.name: Environment and Engine
E2.operationalMeaning: Execution runs inside managed environments and engines with policy controls.

W.name: Workflow and Workforce
W.operationalMeaning: Agents and workflows execute structured tasks with receipts and traceability.

A.name: Architecture and Agents
A.operationalMeaning: Architecture defines law and agents continuously enforce it.

Y.name: Yield and System Output
Y.operationalMeaning: The system must produce clean, scalable, and governed outcomes.
